heading: List Workspace Defaults
body:
To view information about your stream processing workspace tier sizing:

**Admin-api:**

Atlas Administration API

The [List Stream Workspace Details](api/doc/atlas-admin-api-v2/operation/operation-getgroupstreamworkspace)
endpoint lists the details of a stream processing workspace, including the `defaultTierSize`
and `maxTierSize`.

**Atlas UI:**

Atlas UI

To view the `defaultTierSize` and `maxTierSize` of a stream processing workspace in
the Atlas UI, go to the **Stream Processing** page for your
Atlas project.

The `defaultTierSize` and `maxTierSize` are listed at the bottom of
the stream processing workspace card.

**mongosh:**

`mongosh`

To view the `defaultTierSize` and `maxTierSize` of a stream processing workspace
using [mongosh](mongodb-shell), use the [sp.listWorkspaceDefaults()](manual/reference/method/sp.listWorkspaceDefaults) method.

```sh
sp.listWorkspaceDefaults()
```

This method returns:

- `defaultTierSize`

- `maxTierSize`
